## Summary

- explain the problem
- explain the user-facing change

## 摘要

- 说明你解决了什么问题
- 说明用户能感知到什么变化

## Testing

- [ ] `cd apps/web && npm run build`
- [ ] `cd apps/web && npm run test`
- [ ] `python3 -m compileall apps/api workers/story-generator`

## 测试

- [ ] `cd apps/web && npm run build`
- [ ] `cd apps/web && npm run test`
- [ ] `python3 -m compileall apps/api workers/story-generator`

## Notes

- list any schema, environment, or behavior changes
- mention docs updates or intentionally note that none were needed

## 备注

- 列出任何 schema、环境变量或行为边界变化
- 说明文档是否已同步更新，如果没有，也请明确说明原因
